title: Canada's Foreign Minister, Anita Anand, on visit to Latvia
summary_full: On May 19th, the Latvian Minister of Foreign Affairs, Baiba Braže, will host Anita Anand, Minister of Foreign Affairs of Canada, on a working visit to Rīga.
summary_public: On May 19th, the Latvian Minister of Foreign Affairs, Baiba Braže, will host Anita Anand, Minister of Foreign Affairs of Canada, on a working visit to Rīga.
